description: Golden eval set. Each item: a question + the known-correct answer computed from seed data. This is your SCOREBOARD (Study Plan Phase 6) - run it after every change and watch accuracy.

cases.q: What was Wemby's average plus/minus vs OKC in the playoffs?
How many points did Wemby average against OKC in the playoffs?
What were LeBron's average points in 2013?
What was the Joker's average assists in the playoffs?
How many total rebounds did Wemby have vs OKC in the playoffs?
